name: Earth
description: The homeworld, blockaded. The Commonwealth Compact presents the blockade as a 'reconstruction protection zone' under the authority of the Earth Stabilization Mandate. The blockade is the occupation. The glassing of Québec City — the first wartime nuclear warheads used on Earth since 1945 — was the founding trauma of the current era; the blockade is what came after, and the cause of everything since. There is no landing here for a crew on a typical pass. The Compact patrol will hail, ask for manifest and clearance, and turn you around at the gate. The Duskway runners know a different way in. Everyone else is on the manifest, and the manifest is the point.

blockade.narrative: The Commonwealth presents the blockade as a Stabilization Mandate for the protection of civilian populations following the events in Québec. The truth, observable from outside the gate, is a Compact naval cordon around the system and a trade embargo on all off-world traffic. Duskway runners bypass both via jump-drive routes the Compact does not control.
